name: Channel Normalizer
description: Cleans raw IPTV channel titles and resolves them to canonical identifiers via a YAML alias map. Updates stream_id for reliable EPG matching and cross-provider deduplication.

settings.label: Auto-normalize playlists
settings.description: Which playlists to normalize automatically after sync. Leave empty to disable auto-normalization.

settings.label: Alias map directory
settings.description: Path to the directory containing YAML alias files. Defaults to /opt/normalizer/aliases if empty.

settings.label: Re-normalize already-normalized channels
settings.description: When enabled, re-processes channels whose stream_id is already a canonical ID. Usually unnecessary unless the alias map changed.

settings.label: Skip VOD entries
settings.description: Ignore VOD/movie entries and only process live channels.

settings.label: Set clean display titles
settings.description: When a channel is matched, set title_custom to the alias map's display title (e.g. "RAI 1" instead of "IT| RAI 1 UHD"). Only applies to channels without a user-set custom title.
